consensus_variance.narrative: Street's ~$23.5 PT implies a 12-month re-rate toward EPD-parity (~7.7x forward EV/EBITDA / ~8.2x P/DCF on FY27E). We hold the base at ~7.3x EV/EBITDA (7.5x P/DCF) — essentially the current forward multiple carried on a 12-month-higher EBITDA — because (i) net leverage sits at the ~4.4x TOP of the 4.0-4.5x target (S1: Q1'26 10-Q debt $69,317M) and the re-rate is gated on a sub-4.0x print, and (ii) the K-1 / UBTI structural discount versus C-corp midstream has persisted for years. The ~18% magnitude compounds a ~9% multiple gap to full Street parity and a ~9% more-conservative FY27-28 EBITDA/DCF path. The variance is two-tailed — backlog conversion is genuine upside (bull/strong_bull sit ABOVE the Street PT) — so it supports Buy (below-Street PT), not Sell.

revision_velocity.breadth_note: FY26 Adj EBITDA guide RAISED ~$750M (+4%) at Q1'26 (to $18.2-18.6B); growth capex raised to $5.5-5.9B; consensus Strong Buy (13 Buy / 2 Hold / 0 Sell). PTs drifting up.
revision_velocity.pt_revisions_recent: Consensus PT ~$23.5 (S&P Global $23.59; MarketBeat $23.45; ChartMill $23.43); range $21-26; ~16-26% above spot.
revision_velocity.pre_print_drift: Q1'26 beat + guidance raise (2026-05-04). Next print early Aug 2026; midstream low-beta (~0.5-0.85), implied move modest.
revision_velocity.peer_comparison: ET estimate revisions positive (guidance raised) vs EPD's lower-single-digit growth; ET trades at a discount to EPD ~10x EV/EBITDA.
revision_velocity.verdict: Estimates RISING into the print on a guidance raise — a fundamentals-up name. Our edge is on the MULTIPLE (Street's full re-rate), not the estimates.
